steps.input:
python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile,re
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with zipfile.ZipFile(p) as z:
    for name in ['xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml']:
        text=z.read(name).decode('utf-8')
        bad=re.findall(r'#REF!|#DIV/0!|#VALUE!|#NAME\\?|#N/A', text)
        print(name, bad)
PY

task: Advanced high-value task: Sic Inverter Loss Budget Design Change Impact Note. Scenario: a governance team wants a reproducible analysis that another reviewer can rerun from the row data alone for Sic inverter loss budget. Embedded packet: Records: R1 current_A=14 switching_kHz=31 device_loss_W=3; R2 current_A=23 switching_kHz=27 device_loss_W=6; R3 current_A=9 switching_kHz=42 device_loss_W=2. Remediation options: O1 changes current_A by -12% cost=63500; O2 changes switching_kHz by -18% cost=85100; O3 changes device_loss_W by -25% cost=46900; max_budget=109200. Rules and constraints: device_loss>176W is high thermal utilization for a 220W limit; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: quantify the operational consequence of each exception and rank follow-up actions by urgency and evidentiary strength. Deliver SiC_inverter_loss_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
